Curriculum Vitae
Youngji Sohn

Education

University of Warwick, Coventry, UK
PhD Economics 2022–2026 (Expected)
MRes Economics 2020–2022
University of Zurich, Zurich, Switzerland
MA Economics (with distinction) 2018–2021
Pohang University of Science and Technology, Pohang, South Korea
BSc Mathematics (with distinction) 2012–2016

Research Fields

Microeconomic Theory, Game Theory, Contract Theory, Organizational Economics, IO

Working Papers

  • (Dis-)agreement in Misspecified Games 
  • Pay to Quit: Robust Team Incentives with Hidden Need 
    with Hyungmin Park
    Best Graduate Paper Award, 15th Lisbon Meetings in Game Theory and Applications

Publications

  • Vertical Mergers in Ecosystems with Consumer Hold-Up
    with Daniele Condorelli, Jorge Padilla
    Journal of Industrial Economics, 2024

Presentations

  • 2026. Warwick Microeconomics Work in Progress;
    PhD Microeconomic Theory Workshop LSE, UCL and Warwick (London);
    15th Lisbon Meetings in Game Theory and Applications;
    2nd Berlin PhD Conference in Economics;
    Scheduled:
    37th Stony Brook International Conference on Game Theory;
    53rd Annual Conference of EARIE (Mannheim);
    2nd European Economic Theory Conference (London)
  • 2025. Warwick Microeconomics Work in Progress
  • 2024. Warwick Microeconomics Work in Progress
